scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n server,client -c green,blue "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:client"
scripts.build: concurrently -k -n server,client -c green,blue "npm run build:server" "npm run build:client"
scripts.start: concurrently -k -n server,client -c green,blue "npm run start:server" "npm run start:client"
